>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/documents/{document_uuid}/pdf"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get the contractor document pdf.

scope: `contractor_documents:read`
